user_prompt: Hold off escalating — let me try one more reply first. Draft something more empathetic.
actual_output:
I understand. I am ready to help you draft a more empathetic response.

Please share the details of the ticket or the customer's message, along with any context about what has already been tried. Once you provide that, I will draft a response that acknowledges their frustration and offers a supportive path forward.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly identified the user's request to draft a more empathetic response and proactively asked for the necessary context to fulfill that request.
